rationale: Bug hunt C16 found 2 bugs: (1) BUG-027 HIGH — echo_memory cross-run data claimed wired to LLM in C16 but code was never modified. build_narrative_context() didn't extract echo_memory, build_context_enrichment() didn't format it. (2) BUG-028 MEDIUM — tension_zone/convergence_zone from MOS not injected into LLM prompts despite C16 status claiming completion. Both fixed. Feature: q-20260415-005 answer B implemented — 3rd few-shot JSON example in GM system prompt with PROGRESS_MISSION + high rep swings for end-game coverage.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C17 (verify echo_memory actually flows through full pipeline: store→adapter→prompts→LLM). Then feature: GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011, creator chose A: wrap_broc).
